title: 树模型六十年：历史发展历程与最新前沿方向（1963–2026）
summary: 树模型六十年经历单棵树（AID/CHAID/CART/ID3/C4.5）→集成革命（Bagging/AdaBoost/随机森林/GBM/三大工业化 GBDT）→被表格基础模型挑战三次范式转移：凭借与表格数据匹配的归纳偏置统治表格预测二十年，2025 年起 TabPFN 类基础模型在 ≤5 万样本场景首次将其稳定击败，但大数据、低成本与强解释场景仍是树的防线。
original_question: 请给我详细讲一讲 树模型 机器学习模式的历史发展历程以及最新前沿发展方向。要求 1. 构建一个学术风格的 React 应用进行讲解 2. 在网页中配置动态组件，配合真实数据和真实训练结构、算法等，生动的讲解 3. 你应当使用 perplexity mcp 去进行网络搜索，获取最新的论文以及网络介绍。

references.title: Hollmann et al. (2025). Accurate predictions on small data with a tabular foundation model (TabPFN v2). Nature 637
Prior Labs (2025). TabPFN-2.5: Advancing the State of the Art in Tabular Foundation Models
Grinsztajn et al. (2022). Why do tree-based models still outperform deep learning on typical tabular data? NeurIPS 2022
Shwartz-Ziv & Armon (2022). Tabular Data: Deep Learning Is Not All You Need
Chen & Guestrin (2016). XGBoost: A Scalable Tree Boosting System. KDD 2016
Ke et al. (2017). LightGBM: A Highly Efficient Gradient Boosting Decision Tree. NeurIPS 2017
Prokhorenkova et al. (2018). CatBoost: Unbiased Boosting with Categorical Features. NeurIPS 2018
Friedman (2001). Greedy Function Approximation: A Gradient Boosting Machine. Annals of Statistics 29(5)
Marton et al. (2024). GRANDE: Gradient-Based Decision Tree Ensembles for Tabular Data. ICLR 2024
McElfresh et al. (2023). When Do Neural Nets Outperform Boosted Trees on Tabular Data? (TabZilla)
Lin et al. (2020). Generalized and Scalable Optimal Sparse Decision Trees (GOSDT). ICML 2020
Duan et al. (2020). NGBoost: Natural Gradient Boosting for Probabilistic Prediction. ICML 2020
Hollmann, Müller & Hutter (2023). CAAFE: Context-Aware Automated Feature Engineering with LLMs. NeurIPS 2023
